title: The Anatomy of a Great Deception
original_title: The Anatomy of a Great Deception
overview: The Anatomy of a Great Deception is a quasi-political, spiritual documentary following businessman-turned-filmmaker, David Hooper as he deals with the emotions of his own investigation into the events of 9/11.
